tool_calls.input:
{"code":"merged_prs = github.list_pull_requests(state="merged")
created_issues = []

for pr in merged_prs:
    if pr.closes_linear:  # Only process PRs that close a Linear issue
        issue_title = "Verify: " + pr.title
        new_issue = github.create_issue(repo="acme/web", title=issue_title)
        created_issues.append(new_issue)

len(created_issues)"}
